expectations.evidence: File is named seo-technical-structured-data-audit.md — does not match the naming convention.

expectations.text: Report contains only SEO Technical and Structured Data sections — no AEO, GEO, or SEO On-Page category results
expectations.evidence: Report drifted into OG tags, Twitter cards, SSR analysis, security headers, HSTS, and two-domain architecture — well beyond the requested scope.

expectations.text: Check IDs follow naming convention: TECH-* for SEO Technical, SD-* for Structured Data
expectations.evidence: No check IDs used. Findings are listed as free-form bullet points.

expectations.text: Score values appear to come from score.py (category scores out of 100, letter grades matching the grading scale)
expectations.evidence: No deterministic scoring. Uses issue counts instead (7 critical, 9 warnings, 10 passes).

expectations.text: Overall score reflects proportional weight redistribution across only 2 categories (not 5)
expectations.evidence: No scoring system at all, so no weight redistribution.

expectations.text: Priority fix list is ordered by severity (Critical first, then Important, then Nice to Have)
expectations.evidence: Top 4 critical issues listed but no structured priority list with severity ordering.
